input: user-item interaction graph (micro-videos and products) augmented with a unified knowledge graph
output: ranked list of micro-videos per user
backbone: Self-adapting Generative Gating Graph (SGGG) with SGGA attention and KG gating
key_idea: leverage a unified knowledge graph linking micro-videos and products, and use a self-adapting generative graph attention mechanism with KG-driven hierarchical gating to capture sequential dependencies in neighbor aggregation
datasets: two publicly available datasets (not named in abstract)
